title: WP15 example read-protocol evidence pack

records.title: Existing WP13 controlled device-info read boundary
records.collectorOrReviewerNote: Sanitized project evidence for the already-approved WP13 command boundary.

target.interfacePath: Redacted; exact selected path is required at runtime for WP13 only.
target.interfaceNumber: Observed where available; do not infer across devices.

environment.operatingSystem: Document in real evidence; example is sanitized.
environment.observationTool: AK680 Studio controlled read status export or local tester notes

records.responseLength: Document observed response length; do not infer settings state.
records.observedResponseBytesOrPrefix: Optional observed response prefix only; leave blank if unavailable.
records.timingContext: Manual explicit confirmation only; no startup, polling, retry, scan, or automatic execution.
records.userActionContext: Existing WP13 controlled device-info read button, if a tester performed it.
records.readWriteUncertainty: Existing WP13 query is approved only for controlled device-info read; no settings-read support is claimed.
records.reproducibilityNotes: Record observation count and byte stability if hardware testing is performed.
records.safetyNotes: Evidence only. Does not approve new commands, settings reads, writes, retries, polling, or scanning.
records.gplSourceCleanlinessNotes: Maintainer-authored project evidence only; no GPL-3.0 code, comments, constants, packet builders, structures, or implementation copied.
records.reviewerNotes: Use as a format example and WP13 boundary reminder, not as new execution approval.

dossiers.title: Lighting state read evidence placeholder
dossiers.completenessSummary: No safe exact report evidence is present.
dossiers.targetDeviceMetadata: Must be AK680 V2 VID 3141 / PID 32956 if future evidence exists.
dossiers.observedReportDetails: No observed report details; no bytes are proposed.
dossiers.writeRiskAssessment: Unknown write risk; must remain non-executable.
dossiers.unknownsAndUncertainties: Exact report direction, ID, bytes, response shape, and read-only proof are unknown.
dossiers.safetyBoundaries: No execution, no settings-read claim, no write support claim.
dossiers.gplSourceCleanlinessStatement: No GPL-3.0 source code, comments, constants, packet builders, structures, or implementation material copied.
dossiers.reviewerNotes: Placeholder demonstrates an insufficient candidate status.
dossiers.futureReviewRequirements: Separate future work package and Red Team plan required before any implementation.

safetyNotes: Candidate read dossiers are non-executable records.
Evidence completeness does not approve or enable command execution.
Ready for future Red Team review is not a runnable status.
The only executable HID command remains the WP13 AA 10 30 controlled read.
No settings-read support is implemented in WP15.
No write support, apply, sync, save-to-device, retries, polling, scanning, fuzzing, raw command console, arbitrary payload input, packet editing, or command registry execution is implemented.
Validation, import, and export are local data operations and do not touch HID devices.
GPL-3.0 source code, comments, constants, packet builders, structures, and implementation material must not be copied.
